title: Scroll of Biting
move_pattern: Cycles: Chomp → More Teeth → Chew → (randomly Chomp or Chew, with Chew twice as likely)
notes: Starting move varies based on internal state: may begin with Chomp, Chew, or More Teeth. After Chew, enters random selection where Chomp cannot repeat immediately but Chew is twice as likely to occur.
